creator: yanefbsd@gmail.com
text:
Suspend works perfectly fine now in 8.0 (there are some drivers =
that need to be unloaded before the resume -- like if_iwn). acpi_ibm is =
useless and appears to be broken given my initial focused testing last =
night.
	Overall, it's the resume part that's not 100% solid, but that's =
a different issue with ata(4) vs ahci(4) according to some folks -- see =
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2008-July/086912.html =
for more details.
	In the meantime I'm working on getting acpi(4) resume fully =
functional with 8.0 RELEASE, then I'll move up to 8-STABLE and finally =
move on to 9-CURRENT, time permitting. I'll report my findings.
Thanks,
-Garrett=
